steps.title: Identify the defining goal
steps.content: The question explicitly asks the student to explain what a sky island is—not to describe the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains, but to define the concept itself.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly defines the concept: “A sky island is an isolated mountain range whose environment differs drastically from that of the surrounding lowlands,” then uses the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains as an example.

The other three describe the specific mountains or mention the term without defining it.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
